_comment: Footer Supporters strip (Supporter tier, $50/wk). Rendered site-wide via the footer component. Keep the roster short (see cap) to preserve value. Set active:false to hide an entry without deleting it. 'logo' is an optional image path under /img/supporters/; if empty, the strip renders the name as text. When NO entry is active, the strip shows a single house prompt linking to cta_url instead of logos.

supporters.name: Your company here
supporters._note: Example/house entry. Replace with a real supporter and set active:true when one signs.
